# Phase 2A Summary — Feature Schema [Texas]

**Generated by:** Phase 2A Feature Finalization Pipeline

## Reduction Summary

| Stage | Columns | Removed |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Original dataset | 309 | — |
| After Gate 1 (production feasibility) | 282 | 27 |
| After Gate 2 (correlation redundancy) | 251 | 31 |
| **Final retained schema** | **251** | **58 total** |

| `DISCOVERY_DATE` | SAME_DAY_RISK — temporal contamination risk |
| `DISCOVERY_DOY` | SAME_DAY_RISK — temporal contamination risk |
| `DISCOVERY_TIME` | SAME_DAY_RISK — temporal contamination risk |
| `CONT_DATE` | POST_FIRE_ONLY — only exists after fire event (leakage) |

| `CONT_TIME` | POST_FIRE_ONLY — only exists after fire event (leakage) |
| `FIRE_SIZE` | POST_FIRE_ONLY — only exists after fire event (leakage) |
| `FIRE_SIZE_CLASS` | POST_FIRE_ONLY — only exists after fire event (leakage) |
| `FIPS_NAME` | ADMIN_ONLY — administrative identifier, not predictive |
| `SDI` | EXCLUDE — artifact, corrupted, or zero-variance |
| `geometry` | EXCLUDE — artifact, corrupted, or zero-variance |
| `source_year` | EXCLUDE — artifact, corrupted, or zero-variance |

---

## Retained Feature Schema by Update Category

| Update Category | Count | Description |
|----------------|-------|-------------|
| ANNUAL | 31 | Update once per year |
| DAILY | 144 | Download every day for operational prediction |
| EVENT_BASED | 14 | Only exists after a fire event — not for production |
| MONTHLY | 13 | Update monthly |
| STATIC | 49 | Download once; refresh every 2–5 years |

---

## Next Steps

The `feature_schema.csv` is the contract for all downstream phases:

- **Phase 2B:** Build H3 grid (TX: R7, CA: R8) using only burnable cells
- **Phase 2C:** Map FPA-FOD fires to H3 cells → Fire=1 cell-days
- **Phase 2D:** DAY-ECO-MATCHED 1:10 negative sampling + API feature collection
- **Phase 2E:** Assemble final training dataset (Fire=1 + Fire=0)
- **Phase 5:** Train LightGBM/XGBoost → run SHAP/LOO → Gate 3 selection

> Gate 3 (SHAP/LOO ablation) will further reduce from the retained schema
> to the final model feature set. Feature count emerges from data, not pre-decided.
